params.name: id
params.description: Organization id for ephemeral credential

items.docs:
CreateAccessToken creates a short-lived access token in the scope of the
specified organization, provided the user making the request is part of
said organization.

It's possible to specify a validity for the token, which defaults to 1h
and must be no more than 24h. The format is `<number>s`, where `<number>`
is a floating point in seconds (so `123.456789012s` means 123 seconds and
456789012 nanoseconds). See:
https://protobuf.dev/reference/php/api-docs/Google/Protobuf/Duration.html.

UnscopeOrganizationToken removes the organization scope from a token. This
endpoint is useful when a user wants to remove an organization: by
unscoping the token first, the user can then delete the organization
without invalidating his token.

params.name: streams
params.description: (Optional) Filter on stream: either "stdout", "stderr" or "koyeb" (for system logs).

params.description: (Optional) Must always be before `end`. Defaults to 15 minutes ago.

params.name: end
params.description: (Optional) Must always be after `start`. Defaults to now.

params.name: order
params.description: (Optional) `asc` or `desc`. Defaults to `desc`.

params.name: limit
params.description: (Optional) Defaults to 100. Maximum of 1000.

params.name: regex
params.description: (Optional) Apply a regex to filter logs. Can't be used with `text`.

params.name: text
params.description: (Optional) Looks for this string in logs. Can't be used with `regex`.

params.description: (Optional) Filter on the provided regions (e.g. ["fra", "was"]).
